_publications._publicationTitle: Dopamine deficiency underlies learning deficits in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: the attention deficits in Nf1 +/− GFAP CKO mice are rescued by treatments that elevate dopamine levels, but not by Lovastatin (to inhibit Ras hyperactivation)
details: Attention deficits rescued by treatments that elevate dopamine levels, but not by Lovastatin (to inhibit Ras hyperactivation)
